title: Târgoviște, Dâmbovița — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Târgoviște, Dâmbovița: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Târgoviște is a city in Dâmbovița with a population of 79,610. The former capital of Wallachia, known for the Chindia Tower, the Royal Court ruins, and its role in the history of Vlad the Impaler.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
